statuses.name: Block
statuses.description: Absorbs incoming damage before health is reduced.

statuses.name: Bleed
statuses.description: Deals damage at the start of the affected unit's turn.

statuses.name: Focus
statuses.description: Improves draw and energy conversion effects.

statuses.name: Burn
statuses.description: Deals delayed damage and can be consumed by fire skills.

statuses.name: Regeneration
statuses.description: Restores health at the start of the affected unit's turn.
